title: Boiled Argentinian Butter Stir-fry
description: A light and buttery Argentine dish featuring fresh basil that's perfect for a quick weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh basil leaves
8 ounces boneless, skinless chicken breast slices

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil.
Add chicken slices, salt, and pepper. Cook until browned on both sides.
Stir in garlic and cook for about 30 seconds or until fragrant.
Pour in the white wine. Reduce by half.
If using bread cubes, add them to the pan; if not, skip this step.
Toss gently to coat with sauce.
Reduce heat and simmer for about 5 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
